de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class PrettyPrinter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.PrettyPrinter
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    CustomPrettyPrinter, ProgramPrinter

    public class PrettyPrinter
extends java.lang.Object
    A configurable pretty printer for Java source elements originally from COMPOST.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected Type classToPrint
      Enforces the output of real Java syntax that can be compiled.
      protected boolean endAlreadyMarked 
      protected java.lang.Object firstStatement

        n - offset from the current position
        stmt - current statement;

        Marks the end of the first executable statement ...
        Parameters:
        n - offset from the current position

      • getRangeOfFirstExecutableStatement

        public Range getRangeOfFirstExecutableStatement()
        Returns:
        the range of the first executable statement that means the corresponding start and end position in the string representation

      • markKeywordStart

        protected final void markKeywordStart()
        Marks the start of a java keyword.

      • markKeywordEnd

        protected final void markKeywordEnd()
        Marks the end of a java keyword and creates a keyword range.

      • getKeywordRanges

        public final Range[] getKeywordRanges()
        Returns:
        ranges of all java keywords printed.

      • reset

        public void reset()
        Resets the state of this pretty printer ...

      • setWriter

        public void setWriter(java.io.Writer out)
        Set a new stream to write to. Useful to redirect the output while retaining all other settings. Resets the current source positions and comments.

      • getLine

        public int getLine()
        Get current line number.
        Returns:
        the line number, starting with 0.

      • getColumn

        public int getColumn()
        Get current column number.
        Returns:
        the column number, starting with 0.

                            int levelChange,

      • writeToken

        protected void writeToken(int lf,
                          int blanks,
                          java.lang.String image,
                          NonTerminalProgramElement parent)
                   throws java.io.IOException
        Writes an implicit terminal token of a NonTerminal, including its indentation. Sets the indentation if it is necessary or required.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
        See Also:
        SourceElement.prettyPrint(de.uka.ilkd.key.java.PrettyPrinter)

        java.io.IOException - occasionally thrown.

      • getIndentation

        protected int getIndentation()
        Get indentation amount (blanks per level).
        Returns:
        the value of getIntegerProperty("indentationAmount").

      • isOverwritingIndentation

        protected boolean isOverwritingIndentation()
        Returns true if the pretty printer should also reformat existing code.
        Returns:
        the value of the overwriteIndentation property.

      • isOverwritingParsePositions

        protected boolean isOverwritingParsePositions()
        Returns true if the pretty printer should reset the parse positions accordingly.
        Returns:
        the value of the overwriteParsePositions property.

      • printHeader

        protected void printHeader(int lf,
                           int blanks,
                           ProgramElement elem)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Print program element header.
        Parameters:
        lf - an int value.
        blanks - an int value.
        elem - a program element.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - occasionally thrown.

      • printHeader

        protected void printHeader(int blanks,
                           ProgramElement elem)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Print program element header.
        Parameters:
        blanks - an int value.
        elem - a program element.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - occasionally thrown.

      • printHeader

        protected void printHeader(ProgramElement elem)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Print program element header.
        Parameters:
        elem - a program element.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - occasionally thrown.

      • printHeader

        protected void printHeader(int lf,
                           int levelChange,
                           int blanks,
                           ProgramElement x)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Print program element header.
        Parameters:
        lf - number of line feeds.
        levelChange - the level change.
        blanks - number of white spaces.
        x - the program element.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - occasionally thrown.

      • printFooter

        protected void printFooter(ProgramElement x)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Print program element footer.
        Parameters:
        x - the program element.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - occasionally thrown.
